response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior web/full-stack engineer with broad experience, but the profile does not match this embedded networking security role. Critical hard requirements are missing: no indication of native-level Japanese proficiency, only brief C/C++ experience (National Instruments, ~7 months), and no demonstrated Linux kernel investigation or source-modification work. There is no evidence of experience with L2/L3 networking internals, switch products, MACsec, 802.1X, or other security technologies listed as core to the role.
strengths: 15+ years of software development experience with systems-level exposure (DLang low-latency services, C/C++ at National Instruments)
Comfortable on Linux with strong testing culture (TDD, CI/CD) and dev-environment/tooling setup experience
Some hardware-adjacent work (robotic arms, audio hardware thesis project) suggesting adaptability beyond web
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency indicated — a hard requirement (native level)
Minimal recent C/UNIX development; career centers on TypeScript/Node.js web platforms, not embedded firmware
No experience with network switch products, L2/L3 protocols, MACsec/802.1X, or Linux kernel modification

key_factors.factor: General seniority and systems programming exposure
